# Frontend Slides

## Overview
Creates HTML/CSS slide decks that run in the browser without external dependencies. Perfect for developer presentations, tech talks, and documentation.

## Technical Approach
- Single HTML file with embedded CSS and JS
- CSS-based slide management (transform/translate for navigation)
- No external libraries or CDN dependencies
- Print-friendly: each slide on its own page

## Navigation
- Keyboard: Arrow keys, Page Up/Down, Home/End
- Click/tap to advance
- Slide number indicator
- Overview mode (thumbnail grid)

## Styling
- Code-friendly fonts (JetBrains Mono, Fira Code)
- Syntax highlighting via Prism or highlight.js (embedded)
- Dark and light presentation modes
